review_reason: Phase 3 blocked: Plan incorrectly assumes single-family BFMCS modal_backward is 'trivial'. Codebase explicitly documents that single-family modal_backward (phi in MCS -> Box phi in MCS) is NOT provable. See Construction.lean lines 90-97 and Boneyard/SingleFamilyBFMCS.lean. Multi-family construction required but existing infrastructure is Int-specific with sorries. Requires plan revision.

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 COMPLETED: Core linking lemma (timelineQuot_lt_implies_canonicalR). Phase 2 COMPLETED: FMCS structure with forward_G and backward_H. Phase 3 BLOCKED: Cannot build single-family BFMCS. Research-005 Section 6.3 claims modal_backward is 'trivial for singleton' but this is mathematically incorrect.

errors.message: Single-family BFMCS modal_backward is not provable. The statement 'phi in MCS t -> Box phi in MCS t' is equivalent to 'phi -> Box phi' which is false in general modal logic.
errors.recommendation: Options: (1) Port multi-family construction from Int to TimelineQuot, (2) Use existing Int-based infrastructure instead of TimelineQuot, (3) Find alternative proof architecture that avoids BFMCS modal_backward
